sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root עָצַם).-

(1) strong, robust, powerful, used of a people, Gen 18:18 Num 14:12 Deu 4:38 of kings, Psa 135:10. Plur. עֲצוּמִים the strong, the mighty, i.e. heroes, Pro 18:18 Isa 53:12 once the powerful members (of a lion), i.e. claws, teeth; Psa 10:10, נָפַל בַּעֲצוּמָיו חֵלְכָּאִים “the wretched fall into his claws;” but others understand the whelps of the lion.

(2) numerous, Joe 1:6 Psa 33:18.
